chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 180 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: أيما مؤمن مشى مع أخيه في حاجة ولم يناصحه، فقد خان الله ورسوله.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 180. It has been narrated that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Any believer who goes with his brother for a need to help him and does not counsel him correctly has been disloyal to Allah and His Messenger.
